calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear.

The Court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial for plaintiff's failure to comply with the Court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The Court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.

JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
